params.name: Gameover Configuration
params.desc: Setup what to do on gameover

params.name: Player Configuration
params.desc: Setup the player for the game.

params.name: Enemy Player Troop
params.desc: Select a troop for enemy player.

params.name: Reserve Box Size
params.desc: Limit of actors per reserve box

params.name: Capture Fail Animation
params.desc: The animation to play when capture fails

params.name: Gender Configurations
params.desc: Setup available genders in entire project.

params.name: Breeder Hatcher Graphic
params.desc: Character graphic used for breeder graphic

params.name: Breeder Hatcher Graphic Index
params.desc: Character graphic index used for breeder graphic

params.name: Breeder Hatcher Direction
params.desc: Set player facing direction to this

params.name: Main Menu UI Configuration
params.desc: Configure UI settings for menu scene

params.name: Player UI Configuration
params.desc: Configure UI settings for player scene

params.name: Default Actor Battlers
params.desc: The default limit of actor battlers during battle

params.name: Default Enemy Battlers
params.desc: The default limit of enemy battlers during battle

params.name: Item Always
params.desc: Allow item use even if actor cannot move.

params.name: Required Item
params.desc: Require this item in player inventory

params.name: Map X
params.desc: Set the player X-position to this

params.name: Map Y
params.desc: Set the player Y-position to this

params.name: Direction
params.desc: Set player facing direction to this

params.name: Default Character File
params.desc: Select the file to use for player character.

params.name: Default Character File Index
params.desc: If using 8 character sheet, index for character.

params.name: Dash Character File
params.desc: Select the file to use for player character dashing.

params.name: Dash Character File Index
params.desc: If using 8 character sheet, index for character dashing.

params.name: Face Index
params.desc: Index of face used from face file.

params.name: Player Front Facing Graphic
params.desc: A graphic used to represent the player front

params.name: Player Back Facing Graphic
params.desc: A graphic used to represent the player back

params.name: Use Custom Player
params.desc: Instead of using party leader, use custom player

params.name: Player Configuration Variable
params.desc: Variable used to select player configuration in project

params.name: Level
params.desc: Sets enemy level to this value

params.name: Enemy Roster
params.desc: Setup the enemies in the roster

params.name: Item Pool
params.desc: List of items useable by enemy player

params.name: Allow Swap
params.desc: Allows the enemy player to swap out

params.name: Graphic
params.desc: A graphic used to represent the enemy player graphic.

params.name: Required Switch
params.desc: Game switch must be ON for actor to evolve

params.name: Reset Switch
params.desc: Set switch to false on evolve

params.name: Required Level
params.desc: Level required for the actor to evolve.

params.name: Items
params.desc: Player must have items in inventory

params.name: Gold
params.desc: Player must have equal to or more than this value

params.name: HP Bonus
params.desc: Applies bonus to capture rate based on HP rate.

params.name: MP Bonus
params.desc: Applies bonus to capture rate based on MP rate.

params.name: TP Bonus
params.desc: Applies bonus to capture rate based on TP rate.

params.name: Ultimate Skill
params.desc: Force skill use when TP is at max value

params.name: Capture Actor
params.desc: The actor that would be captured.

params.name: Allow Capture States
params.desc: States that allow enemy to be captured.

params.name: Block Capture States
params.desc: States that prevent enemy from being captured

params.name: Ignore Enemy Database
params.desc: Ignores enemy stats settings from database

params.name: Use Limit
params.desc: Number of times skill can be used.

params.name: Capture Rate
params.desc: Allows this skill to be used for capture.

params.name: Capture Rate
params.desc: Allows this item to be used for capture.

params.name: Hex Color
params.desc: Hex Color Code for color blend

params.name: Color Method
params.desc: Method to apply to the color filter. Applies Color Matrix Settings.

params.name: Color Brightness
params.desc: Brightness value for Brightness Method. 1 = Default.

params.name: Color Contrast
params.desc: Contrast value for Contrast Method. 1 = Default.

params.name: Color Hue
params.desc: Hue value for Hue Method. 0 = Default.

params.name: Color Night
params.desc: Night value for Night Method. 0 = Default.

params.name: Color Predator
params.desc: Night value for Night Method. 0 = Default.

params.name: Color Saturate
params.desc: Night value for Night Method. 0 = Default.

params.name: Color Tint
params.desc: Night value for Night Method. Uses Hex Value eg: 0x000000.

params.name: Gender Hex Blend
params.desc: Changes the color blend of named gender traits

params.name: Icon
params.desc: Icon Index of Gender (0 for no icon)

params.name: Required Steps
params.desc: Number of steps to get actor from pre-breed

params.name: Random Steps
params.desc: Random number between 0 and this removed from required.

params.name: Fuse Stats Only
params.desc: Only consider fusion stats and not base stats

params.name: Region ID
params.desc: The region ID setting applies to.

params.name: Map
params.desc: The ID of the map to use this data

params.name: Breeder EXP Growth
params.desc: Set exp gain for actors in breeder for the map.

params.name: Font Face
params.desc: Font face used for the window.

params.name: Font Outline Thickness
params.desc: The thickness of the text outline

params.name: Window Skin
params.desc: Image file used for the window skin.

params.name: Label X
params.desc: Position of the label text in window

params.name: Label Y
params.desc: Position of the label text in window

params.name: Gauge Current Value
params.desc: How to set gauge current value

params.name: Gauge Max Value
params.desc: How to set gauge max value

params.name: Gauge X
params.desc: Position of the gauge in window

params.desc: Position of the gauge in window

params.name: Gauge Border
params.desc: Border size indent of the gauge
